title: glaucium flavum var. leiocarpum
intro: Glaucium flavum var. leiocarpum, also known as horn poppy or yellow horned poppy, is a plant species within the papaveraceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive horn-like structure on its seed pods. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Glaucium flavum var. leiocarpum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its roots and flowers, which are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions.
